name: shravan-dev-workflow
description: Codex-first development workflow plugin with evidence-backed review orchestration and TUI presentation guidance for structured chat output.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-first workflow with review and TUI presentation
interface.longDescription: Use Shravan Dev Workflow to run evidence-backed code and plan reviews with Codex subagents as the primary reviewers, agy as external counsel for substantial reviews, and optional Claude or Gemini adversarial lanes only when explicitly requested. It also includes TUI presentation guidance for structured chat output where markdown is unreliable for document layout but semantic markdown still belongs to code, links, paths, URLs, and technical tokens.
